synopsis: Collects (not listed in reading order) Dark Horse Presents (1986) Annual 2000, Star Wars (1998) #1-6, Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000) #1-4, Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War (2000) #1-4, Star Wars: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan – Last Stand on Ord Mantell (2000) #1-3, and Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan – The Aurorient Express (2002) #1-2
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith
